violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the cookline equipment (Surfaces between equipment) were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023

The floor in the cookline area in the cookline area was observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
